summary: MVP first-run testing for GuionViral. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed (health, save-text success + validation, generate-upload with real MP4 that returned an AI-generated script, generate link with YouTube URL that succeeded via thumbnail fallback, history listing with no _id leak and newest-first order, delete existing/nonexistent). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): app loads with all testIDs; mode-segment, url/description/style inputs, 4 tone chips, process-button all render; text mode saves via /api/save-text and shows result-card correctly; mode switching clears result; upload mode renders pick-video-button; History tab lists items produced by backend tests, play button toggles, delete removes the item. No page-level JS errors. Minor: props.pointerEvents deprecation warning (dependency-level) and useNativeDriver missing (expected on web). TypeScript type `ScriptItem.source_type` in /app/frontend/src/api.ts is missing 'upload' in the union — only a typing issue, runtime works.
action_items: OPTIONAL/TYPING: Update ScriptItem.source_type in /app/frontend/src/api.ts to include 'upload' (currently 'link' | 'text' — backend returns 'upload' for /generate-upload). Also consider adding `style?: string | null` to the ScriptItem type since backend now returns it.
OPTIONAL: The console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' comes from a library. Not blocking; if desired, verify all @expo/react-native deps are up to date.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: All I/O properly async; sync ffmpeg/yt-dlp run inside asyncio.to_thread — good.
server.py: MongoDB _id excluded via projection {'_id': 0} in history endpoints — verified in tests.
server.py: Proper HTTP status codes (400 for empty inputs, 404 for missing history item, 502 for external failures).
server.py stays under 500 lines; endpoints are cohesive; env vars used (no hardcoded URLs).
Frontend uses only RN components (View/Text/Pressable/TextInput/ScrollView/FlatList), StyleSheet.create everywhere, testIDs on every interactive element, EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is read from env.
Minor TS typing gap: api.ts ScriptItem.source_type lacks 'upload'.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of exercised flows (mode switching, text-mode save-text integration, history listing, history play, history delete)

seed_data_creation: The backend tests created 2 items that remained visible in the History screen at time of UI test (one from /generate-upload with sample.mp4 titled 'TEST_sample'/'sample.mp4', and one from /generate link that used the YouTube thumbnail fallback). One extra was deleted during the UI delete test. Best-effort cleanup fixture removes TEST_ prefixed items after the pytest session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints all functional including /api/generate (YouTube fallback path works). Sample MP4 for /api/generate-upload is at /tmp/sample.mp4 (regenerated by fixture if missing). Frontend testIDs available: mode-segment, mode-{link|upload|text}, url-input, description-input, style-input, tone-{viral|educativo|humor|motivacional}, text-input, pick-video-button, process-button, loading-overlay, result-card, result-text, copy-script-button, reset-button, history-empty, history-card-{id}, play-{id}, delete-{id}. Native TTS won't play audio on web — only verify state.
